testcase.name: Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P0-AC1-001] should show Mis OTs view for assigned technician
Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P0-AC1-002] should show OT card with required information
Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P0-AC1-003] should NOT show OTs assigned to other technicians
Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P1-AC1-004] should show bottom nav tab "Mis OTs" on mobile
Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P1-AC1-005] should filter OTs by technician assignment

failure.message: P0-ac1-mis-ots-view.spec.ts:120:7 [P1-AC1-005] should filter OTs by technician assignment

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › story-3.2\P0-ac1-mis-ots-view.spec.ts:120:7 › Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P1-AC1-005] should filter OTs by technician assignment
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByTestId('mis-ots-lista') Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for getByTestId('mis-ots-lista')
129 | // Verify list is filtered by current user's assignments 130 | // Current user is tecnico@hiansa.com (from storage state) > 131 | await expect(misOtsList).toBeVisible(); | ^ 132 | 133 | // All visible OTs should have current user in assignments 134 | // This requires database validation - for now, just verify list loads at C:\Users\ambso\dev\gmao-hiansa\tests\e2e\story-3.2\P0-ac1-mis-ots-view.spec.ts:131:30

testcase.name: Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P2-AC1-006] should show empty state when no OTs assigned

property.name: skip
property.value: Requires user with no OTs assigned - test data setup needed
